summary: The task initially risked mixing canonical doc ownership with generated adapter ownership. The issue was resolved by creating bounded writable roles and validating overlaps.
pain_points: It was not obvious where canonical doc ownership ended and generated adapter ownership began.
root_causes: The repository previously lacked an explicit role registry and overlap validation.

actions.description: Use the delegation-planning skill before parallelizing work with multiple writable scopes.
Fail governance validation when writable owned paths overlap.

recommended_role_changes: No new role is required; bounded ownership is sufficient.
recommended_skill_changes: Keep delegation-planning as the default response before proposing a new role.
recommended_validation_changes: Keep adapter drift and writable ownership overlap checks active in governance validation.
